_comment: v4.0.35 — narrow Cognitive Eval Harness (Codex roadmap Phase 7a). Scenarios exercise the cognitive contour built up across Phases 1-5: BeliefState, TaskState, ActionPlanner, Verifier, UncertaintyPolicy. Each scenario runs a fixed turn sequence through Conversation::turn_with_trace and asserts against trace signals (action, task status, epistemic status, output substrings). Initial baseline: every scenario must pass.

scenarios.description: Asking same topic twice keeps the goal — set_at_turn must not advance.
Social turn (рахмет) between same-topic turns must not erase the goal.
Many social turns + topic — goal_set_at_turn reflects real turn index, not capped at MAX_HISTORY.
Different topic in second turn switches the goal.
Topic switch through a social turn still installs new topic at the right turn id.
Subgoals reset on topic switch (none in v4.0.35 but invariant must hold).
Two conflicting city statements → belief logs conflict, status becomes Blocked, epistemic Conflicted.
After conflict + topic question, reply must cite both values + clarification cue.
Conflict reply must use Kazakh predicate label, not raw English slot key.
Greeting → Action::Social, EpistemicStatus::Certain.
Thanks → Action::Social, EpistemicStatus::Certain.
Real Kazakh noun without attached reasoning chain or retrieval index → AskClarification + Tentative.
Known topic with reasoning chain attached → RunReasoner + Derived.
Clean reasoning chain (no belief conflict) — verifier supports, output cites chain.
Belief conflict + reasoning chain → verifier rejects, evidence stripped, output is conflict-surfacing.
Unknown topic, no evidence — verifier doesn't gate (clean path), reply is gentle clarification or noun-echo.
Social greeting → Certain.
Reasoning chain present → Derived.
Real Kazakh noun («бала») without any attached reasoning/retrieval → Tentative band.
Belief contradiction + topic with chain → Conflicted (dominates Derived).

v4.0.40: input that doesn't reduce to a topic, evidence, or chain (e.g. nonsense word) routes to AskClarification (epistemic Tentative, 'rephrase please?') instead of RefuseOutOfScope (epistemic Unknown). Distinct from the 'real topic, no evidence' branch (also Tentative, but says 'I don't have facts about X'). Was aspirational pre-v4.0.40 (cognitive_eval flagged it as gap in v4.0.35).

v4.0.41: when belief has a pending contradiction and the user's next turn names one of the candidate object values (via Statement* intent OR raw-input substring match like 'астанада дұрыс'), the dialog resolves the conflict — chosen → Active, others → Superseded, BeliefConflict + ContradictionToResolve pending question dropped. Skips absorb_entities for the resolution turn so the chosen value isn't double-recorded as a fresh Active fact. Was aspirational pre-v4.0.41.

v4.2.5: After user states their name, AskName ('атың кім') routes to Action::AnswerDirect AND surfaces the stored name in the reply via the new ask_name.with_known_user template family (planner override fires when session.contains_key('name')). Closes the v4.2.1 aspirational gap. Reply text changes from 'мені адам деп атайды' (default self-introduction) to 'сіздің атыңыз — Дәулет' or similar slot-aware variant.

v4.2.5: AskAge ('жасың неше') surfaces stored age. Required closing TWO bugs together: (1) the v4.2.5 ask_age.with_known_user template family that consumes the stored value, AND (2) a long-latent bug where the cognitive token-extraction filter in semantics.rs stripped digits via 'is_alphabetic() || -' — so '30' in 'менің жасым 30' never reached parse_kazakh_age and StatementOfAge came out with years: None, leaving session['age'] unset. Filter now also accepts is_ascii_digit. Found by the v4.2.1 cognitive eval expansion.
v4.2.5: AskLocation ('қайда тұрасың') surfaces stored city via the new ask_location.with_known_user template family. Reply changes from 'менің мекенім жоқ' to e.g. 'сіз Алматыда тұрасыз'.

v4.2.5: AskOccupation ('немен айналысасың') surfaces stored occupation via the new ask_occupation.with_known_user template family. Reply changes from default self-description to e.g. 'сіз мұғалім екенсіз'.

v4.2.5: 5-turn flow exercising belief persistence across social interjections. Name set turn 0 still drives AnswerDirect on turn 4 (with the v4.2.5 slot-aware template family) after `сәлем`/`рахмет`/`қайырлы күн` interjections. Closes the v4.2.1 aspirational variant; demonstrates that belief lifecycle and slot-aware rendering compose cleanly.
v4.2.1: Re-stating the same name twice doesn't create a contradiction — both statements have the same value, so the second supersedes the first cleanly. belief_contradictions_count stays 0.
v4.2.1: Compliment intent ('сіз керемет') routes to Action::Social, EpistemicStatus::Certain. Closes the action_routing coverage gap for compliments.
v4.2.1: Apology intent ('кешір') routes to Action::Social, EpistemicStatus::Certain. Closes the action_routing coverage gap for apologies.
v4.2.6: AskTime intent ('сағат неше') is in is_social_intent → Action::Social, EpistemicStatus::Certain. Closes coverage gap.
v4.2.6: AskWeather intent ('бүгін ауа райы қалай') is in is_social_intent → Action::Social, EpistemicStatus::Certain.
v4.2.6: Insult intent ('ақымақсың') routes through is_social_intent → polite non-engagement (v1.1.0). Action::Social, EpistemicStatus::Certain.

v4.2.6: AskFamily intent ('балаларың бар ма') is NOT in is_social_intent and has no belief_direct_answer slot mapping. Falls through to RefuseOutOfScope/Unknown. Documents the current gap — future capability work could map AskFamily to a family-related belief slot.

v4.2.6: Setting name + city + occupation across 3 turns leaves belief in a clean state — no contradictions across the slots. Each Statement* fires absorb_entities; each writes a fresh Active fact on a different (subject, predicate) so the single-active-fact invariant doesn't trigger any conflicts.

v4.2.6: Conflicts on TWO different slots accumulate independently. After name=A, city=X, name=B, city=Y, the belief should log 2 BeliefConflicts (one per (USER, name) and (USER, city)). Validates that the v4.0.27 single-active-fact invariant is per-(subject, predicate), not global.

v4.2.6: After three sequential Statement* turns set name + city + age, asking AskLocation should still surface the city via AnswerDirect — belief facts on different slots don't interfere with each other's lookup.

v4.2.6: With reasoning chain attached AND user profile set, asking a topic still surfaces the chain (epistemic Derived). Belief absorption on turn 0 doesn't pollute the verification path — the v4.0.32 verifier supports the chain because there's no contradiction on the topic.

v4.3.1: re-stating the same person name in a different surface case (`Дәулет` then `дәулет`) collapses to the same canonical entity via `language_core::canonical_person_entity` — no contradiction, no separate memory entry. Validates the v4.3.1 person-canonical-entity wiring of `absorb_entities::Intent::StatementOfName`. Surface variant `дәулет` normalizes to canonical `Дәулет` before the belief layer sees it, so the `record_user_fact` writes the SAME object string both turns and the single-active-fact invariant collapses them cleanly.

v4.3.1: same canonical-entity guarantee under mixed-script restatement (`Дәулет` then `дӘУЛEТ` — Latin homoglyphs `E`/`T` cleaned to Cyrillic `Е`/`Т` by `normalize_proper_noun`, then title-cased back to `Дәулет`). Confirms that the v4.3.0 mixed-script cleanup feeds the v4.3.1 canonical resolver correctly.

v4.3.1: canonical-entity invariance must NOT swallow real conflicts. `Дәулет` then `Ерлан` are different canonical persons (`person:Дәулет` vs `person:Ерлан`), so the second statement DOES register as a contradiction on `(USER, name)`. Guards against the canonical layer over-collapsing distinct names.

v4.3.2 regression: real-dialog test (2026-04-26) revealed that stating an occupation containing `жасанды интеллект` locked the dialog into a permanent CheckContradiction. Root cause: `token_mentions_generic_place` used substring match (`token.contains(stem)`) and the 2-char stem `ел` (country) appears inside `интеллект`. The false positive made `recover_named_place_before_generic_location` promote `жасанды` to a city, the belief layer logged a phantom `(USER, city, Жасанды)` against the genuine `(USER, city, Атырау)`, and every subsequent topic question routed into CheckContradiction. v4.3.2 switches the predicate to prefix match (`starts_with`); this scenario locks the regression closed.
turns: Мен жаңа жасанды интеллект моделін әзірлейтін бағдарламашымын

scenarios.description: v4.3.3 (Track B): `сен кімсің` is the pronoun-led identity question addressed to adam. New `Intent::AskAboutSystem` detector (gated by 2nd-person pronoun + identity question word) preempts `detect_ask_name`, so even after the user states their own name, the question routes to the `ask_about_system` template family that always surfaces adam's self-introduction. Action::AnswerDirect with epistemic Certain. Output must mention `адам` (the system's name), not the user's stored name.

v4.3.3 (Track B): the user-shared dialog turn `А, сен кімсің және атың кім?` mixes two identity questions — `сен кімсің` (about adam) and `атың кім` (would historically route to AskName). The new AskAboutSystem detector runs FIRST and matches the pronoun-led `сен кімсің` part, so the whole turn routes to AskAboutSystem and adam introduces itself rather than echoing the user's name. Locks the user-reported failure mode closed.
turns: А, сен кімсің және атың кім?

scenarios.description: v4.3.4 (Track B Phase 1 #2): `сені кім жасады?` routes to Intent::AskAboutSystem { aspect: Creator }. Planner picks the `ask_about_system.creator` template family which interpolates the `system_creator` slot from Conversation::system_identity (canonical default: Баймурзин Даулет Абузарович). Output must mention the creator's surname.

v4.3.4: `қашан пайда болдың?` routes to AskAboutSystem { aspect: Birthdate }. Planner picks `ask_about_system.birthdate` family with `system_birthdate` slot (canonical default: 2026-04-07, the repository creation date). Output must contain the ISO-formatted date string.

v4.3.4: `сенің ерекшелігің не?` routes to AskAboutSystem { aspect: Architecture }. Planner picks `ask_about_system.architecture` family with `system_architecture` slot (canonical default summary: rule-based, symbolic chains, not statistical). Output must mention `архитектур` (architecture).

v4.3.4: `сен қандай моделсің?` routes to AskAboutSystem { aspect: General }. The `ask_about_system` family interpolates `system_full_name` and `system_abbreviation` so the reply mentions either `Nano Language Model` or `NLM` (along with the canonical name `адам`).

v4.3.5 (Track A): real-test 2026-04-26 dialog turn `Жазушы Мүсірепов туралы не білесіз?` was answered with a generic 'what is a writer' template because `жазушы` (in lexicon) won over `мүсірепов` (out of lexicon) for the noun_hint. New `topic_marker_hint` consults the marker `туралы` first and picks the immediately preceding word — proper noun extracted correctly. AskClarification fires (no v4.3.5 world_core entry yet for surname-only Müsirepov; that comes with the kz_literature expansion in the same release).

v4.3.5 (Track A): real-test 2026-04-26 dialog turn `Онда маған X туралы айтып беріңізші` had `Онда` parsed as `он + Locative` (root `он` = ten), so the topic extractor returned `Он` and the planner emitted `Он — сан`. Now `онда`/`сонда`/`бұнда`/`мұнда` are in NOT_A_TOPIC; topic_marker_hint correctly picks the proper noun before `туралы` (`Малқаров`).
turns: Онда маған ақын Омарбай Малқаров туралы айтып беріңізші

scenarios.description: v4.4.0 (Phase 2 Track C): user logs two contradictory residences (`Алматыда тұрамын` then `Астанада тұрамын`); the system asks `Алматы ма, әлде Астана ма?`. User replies `екеуі де жоқ` → Conversation::try_dismiss_pending_contradiction supersedes both facts and clears the pending question. Action routes to DismissContradiction; epistemic status is Certain (we acted, no false claim); output mentions «екеу» / «ұмыт» / «жад» so the user knows the slot is now blank.

v4.4.0: a softer dismissal — the user says `білмеймін` after the contradiction prompt. Same effect: both candidate facts marked Superseded, contradiction cleared from belief, DismissContradiction action.
